themeEditor.fileTooLarge: Kuo lahi ange 'a e faile 'i he 1 MB
themeEditor.dragDropLogo: Tō pe lomi'i ke 'apalōtí 'a e logo
themeEditor.themeSaved: Kuo fakafou lelei ʻa e kaveinga

themeEditor.storageFull: Kuo fonu ʻa e tukuʻanga ʻo e polokalamá. Tāmateʻi ha teima ʻoku ʻikai ngāueʻaki pea toe ʻahiʻahi.
themeEditor.saveFailed: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke fakahū ʻa e teimá. Kātaki ʻo toe ʻahiʻahi.

loginSample.title: Sīpinga Hū
loginSample.headline: Faingofua. Mālohi. Pule'anga Sēini Tokoni.
loginSample.welcome: Talitali fiefia ki he Open mSupply. Ko ho hoa ngāue ki hono puleʻi ʻo e sēini tokoni moʻui lelei mo hono fakaleleiʻi ʻo e maʻu faito'o.
